other_observers: Andy Boyce, Brandon Percival, Mark Peterson, Scott Schaum, Bill Maynard, and Bryan Gibbons.; Bryan Gibbons found it in one of the banding nets
duration: We had it in hand for about 20 minutes and we watched it for about 3 minutes after it was released
specific_location: It was caught and banded at the banding station at Chico Basin Ranch.
description: It had bright yellowish green sides and flanks. It had a greenish yellow back. It had two white wing bars. It had a dark gray head with a white lores and eye ring. It was a strong contrast between the head and the back of the bird. It also had a strong contrast between the gray head a bright white throat. It had a grayish green tail with white edges to the outer most tail feathers. The secondaries are the same color as the back with a few whiter feathers.Behaviors: When we released the bird it flew up into a large Cottonwood and started working its way up the tree.Call: Didn't hear it.Plumage: Unknown
photographer: Photographer: Cole Wild, Cole Wild, Cole Wild
